name: css-typed-om-polyfill
description: This project aims to provide a complete TypeScript polyfill for the [CSS Typed OM Level 1 Specification](https://www.w3.org/TR/css-typed-om-1/).

scripts.build: npm run build:module && npm run build:cjs && npm run build:iife && npm run build:types
scripts.test:wpt: npm run test:wpt:setup && cd tests/wpt/wpt && (python wpt run --headless -y --log-wptreport ../report/data.json --log-wptscreenshot=../report/screenshots.txt --log-html=../report/index.html --inject-script ../../../build/css-typed-om-polyfill.iife.js firefox css/css-typed-om || true)
scripts.test:wpt:baseline: npm run test:wpt:setup && cd tests/wpt/wpt && (python wpt run --headless -y --log-wptreport ../report/data-baseline.json --log-wptscreenshot=../report/screenshots-baseline.txt --log-html=../report/index-baseline.html firefox css/css-typed-om || true)
scripts.test:wpt:local: npm run test:wpt:setup && cd tests/wpt/wpt && python wpt serve --inject-script ../../../build/css-typed-om-polyfill.iife.js
